title: Eduversal Academic Year Arc — Calendar Anchors
description: Shared timing reference used by every role weekly-checklist JSON. Maps Indonesian curriculum calendar + Cambridge exam cycles + Eduversal network events onto the 40-week academic year (Sem-1 = W1-W18, mid-year break, Sem-2 = W19-W40).

indonesian_calendar_anchors.1: Tahun ajaran baru begins. MPLS for new students. RKAS implementation begins.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.2: Hari Kemerdekaan RI (17 Aug). First full instructional week.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.3: Baseline diagnostic assessments. Class lists finalised.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.4: First Week-4 PLC of the year. First Domain Heatmap reading.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.6: Mid-Sem-1 progress check. First parent communication round.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.8: Cambridge Oct/Nov standard entry deadline (late August historically).
indonesian_calendar_anchors.12: Cambridge Oct/Nov exam series starts. Hari Pahlawan (10 Nov).
indonesian_calendar_anchors.16: End-of-Sem-1 assessments administration. Internal moderation cycle.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.17: Report card writing. Grading integrity audit window.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.18: Hari Ibu (22 Dec). Sem-1 close. Reports issued to parents. Winter recess.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.19: Semester 2 begins. Mid-year IPDL review window opens.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.21: Cambridge March/Feb registration deadline (mid October prior year).
indonesian_calendar_anchors.25: Mid-Sem-2 assessments. Cambridge May/June registration (late February).
indonesian_calendar_anchors.27: Ramadhan window (variable Mar-May depending on year).
indonesian_calendar_anchors.29: Hari Kartini (21 Apr). Idul Fitri (variable). PPDB begins for following year.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.31: Hari Pendidikan Nasional (2 May). Cambridge May/June exam series.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.33: Cambridge May/June exam series in progress.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.35: End-of-Sem-2 assessments preparation. Kenaikan kelas planning begins.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.39: Reports issued. Annual appraisal cycles complete.
indonesian_calendar_anchors.40: Year-end recess. Annual archive audit. New SIP drafting.

eduversal_network_anchors.1: Annual School Leadership Alignment & Strategic Development Workshop (Eduversal HQ-led, all schools attend).
eduversal_network_anchors.4-5: Semester 1 school appraisal visit window opens.
eduversal_network_anchors.6: First HQ Specialist site visits begin.
eduversal_network_anchors.8-12: Semester 1 school appraisal visit window peak.
eduversal_network_anchors.23-26: Semester 2 school appraisal visit window opens.
eduversal_network_anchors.27-32: Semester 2 school appraisal visit window peak.
eduversal_network_anchors.39-40: Annual Principal Appraisal cycle close. Network year-end review.

weekly.monday: Leadership Stand-Up (10 min); At-Risk Tracker review
weekly.tuesday_to_thursday: Walkthroughs (HoD min 3-5); ASP/TISC check-ins as scheduled
weekly.friday: Lesson plans submitted for following week (16:00); LP spot-check; data integrity audit

monthly.week_1_of_month: Pacing Audit; LPQR Monthly Report; Institutional Risk Report
monthly.week_2_of_month: Learning Walk (full ALT); Language Compliance Heat Map
monthly.week_4_of_month: Strategy PLC (90 min); ALT Dashboard Review; PLC Impact Report

quarterly.end_of_term_1: Quarterly Academic Review (QAR 1); Board Quarterly Report 1
quarterly.end_of_term_2_mid_year: QAR 2; Mid-year SIP review; Board Quarterly Report 2
quarterly.end_of_term_3: QAR 3; Vertical Curriculum Map update; Board Quarterly Report 3
quarterly.end_of_term_4_year_end: QAR 4 (Annual); Annual Appraisals; Governance Archive Audit

provenance.indonesian_anchors_source: Kemendikdasmen Kalender Pendidikan + Permendikdasmen 13/2025 (deep learning curriculum schedule)
provenance.cambridge_anchors_source: Cambridge International Handbook for Centres — current edition (deadline windows are typical, exact dates per year vary)
provenance.eduversal_anchors_source: Eduversal Network Calendar + EASE assessment cycle history (cross-referenced with project_repo_layout.md)
provenance.governance_rhythm_source: Adapted from Semesta School Academic Leadership Governance Handbook, Section 12 (Master Governance Schedule)

usage_notes: When a role JSON references a week number, that week number maps to the Indonesian academic year above (W1 = first instructional week of August, NOT calendar week 1 of the year).
Cambridge deadlines vary year-to-year — the week numbers are typical anchors; the seed script must accept a per-year override map.
The Eduversal network anchors are policy commitments — these are the windows in which HQ-led activities run. School-level activities scheduled in these windows must defer.

Induction window alignment is bidirectional: a teacher in induction stage 3 (foundation) is in W2-12 of their first year. The weekly checklist's induction_overlay layers extra tasks on these weeks for that user only.
